name: Marina Green
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Draft environmental impact report : the 34th America's Cup & James R. Herman Cruise Terminal and Northeast Wharf Plaza
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept,San Francisco (Calif.). City Attorney's Office,Port of San Francisco (Calif.),Environmental Science Associates,Orion Environmental Associates,Applied Marine Sciences,Coast and Harbor Engineering,Geotechnical Consultants, Inc,Hydroconsult Engineers, Inc,Natalie Macris Writing & Editing,Adavant Consulting,Boudreau Associates, LLC,ENVIRON Corporation,LCW Consulting,Yuki Kawaguchi, Cartographer,San Francisco (Calif.). Mayor's Office of Economic and Workforce Development,34th America's Cup Event Authority,America's Cup Organizing Committee,AECOM Consult, Inc,KMD Architects & Pfau Long Architecture,Premier Structures,Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 34th America's Cup draft EIR proposes an "AC Village" race venue at Marina Green, with renderings viewed from Marina Boulevard.

documents.title: Minutes / Recreation and Park Commission
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Recreation and Park Commission minutes index resolutions on a Marina Green bear-vending concession, a Marina Green report, and no-parking at the green.

documents.title: Agenda / Operations Committee
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Commission. Operations Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Operations Committee agendas approve events on Marina Green — a tented event at its west end, "Australia By the Bay," and an overnight charity walk using the green as a stop.

documents.title: A scenic parkway for the park : report of the Doyle Drive Task Force to the San Francisco Board of Supervisors
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Doyle Drive Task Force
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 1993 Doyle Drive Task Force report describes the bayfront recreation corridor running from the Marina Green to Fort Point and residents' petitions to reduce traffic affecting park users along it.

documents.title: What's doing in the parks?
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Department
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Recreation and Park "What's doing in the parks" bulletins list Artists Guild outdoor art shows and other activities held on Marina Green.
